◎简　　介  

　　Set in a small Welsh village in 1990. America and Russia have engaged in nuclear war and the structure of British society has changed radically. Billy Hampton (Bill Paxton), an American draft-evader, is brainwashed by a feminist group to assassinate Major Whitbread who runs the Welsh village.In his last year at U.T. Huckabee began work on an ambitious 35mm, wide-screen feature...
